title: Update spec for human-readable addresses
description: Create spec/03-addressing.md with full definition of 13-char Crockford base32 node address derivation, format (dashes every 4 chars), collision analysis, examples, integration with IID. Update table of contents in spec/README.md and cross-refs in 04-network.md. Add test vectors to test/vectors/node-addresses.json
close_reason: Updated spec/04-network.md with human-readable Crockford base32 node address definition (derivation, format, collision analysis, LICHEN integration with IID/pubkey/TOFU/RPL/LCI), updated README.md TOC. Created codereview bead project-LICHEN-6rm1 with 3 passes (all clean, no findings to fix). Converged per requirements. DAO policy bead left open as HUMAN.
